Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 50 

CLM_SRC_IP_ADMSN_CD 

LABEL: Claim Source Inpatient Admission Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the source of the referral for the admission or visit. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_SRC_IP_ADMSN_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_SRC_IP_ADMSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base
